name: Spring Risotto with Artichokes and Peas
recipeIngredient: 1 can artichoke hearts, drained and quartered (14 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large nonstick skillet, heat the butter and oil over medium heat. Add the onion and garlic; saute until softened, about 5 minutes. Stir in the rice and cook, stirring for 2 minutes.
2. Slowly start to add the liquid (about a ladleful at a time). Cook, covered, over low heat, 10 minutes. Wait until the liquid has been absorbed each time before adding the next ladleful. Repeat the cooking process, covered, another 10 minutes.
3. Uncover and stir in the artichokes and lemon peel. Continue cooking, uncovered, adding the liquid slowly and stirring often. The risotto should cook a total of about 30 minutes until creamy with a little bite at the center of the rice.
4. During the last few minutes of cooking time, stir in the peas, lemon juice, dill, parsley, and salt and pepper to taste (the risotto may not need additional salt depending on the broth used).
5. Stir in the Parmesan just before serving.
